title: Quantum Pro Wireless Earbuds
description: Premium noise-canceling wireless earbuds with 40-hour battery life and deep bass. Perfect for commuting and workouts.

title: AeroFlex Running Shoes
description: Lightweight, breathable running shoes designed for marathon runners and casual joggers alike.

title: SmartHome Hub 2.0
description: Control your entire house with your voice. Integrates with all major smart appliances and lights.

title: UltraVision 4K Monitor
description: 27-inch 4K UHD monitor with HDR10 support and 144Hz refresh rate for gaming and professional design.

title: ErgoChair Pro+
description: Ergonomic office chair with lumbar support, adjustable armrests, and a breathable mesh back.

title: Zenith Mechanical Keyboard
description: Customizable RGB mechanical keyboard with tactile switches for satisfying typing and gaming.

title: HydroFlask Insulated Bottle
description: Keep your drinks ice-cold for 24 hours or piping hot for 12 hours. 32oz capacity.

title: Lumina Smart Bulb Set
description: Pack of 4 color-changing smart LED bulbs. Connects to Wi-Fi without a hub.
